title: utf-8 characters in long string
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_utf8 (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, value DOUBLE PRECISION NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_utf8 (name, value) VALUES ('Sample text with utf-8: 😊', 123.45);
SELECT * FROM test_utf8 WHERE name IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_utf8 SET name = 'Updated text with utf-8: 你好' WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: utf-8 characters in long string handling
